sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58347" key="koilostomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοιλο-στομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hollowness of voice</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
